trade.summary: Significant bilateral trade driven by technology, pharmaceuticals, and defence. The UK exports machinery, financial services, and chemicals to Israel. Israel exports software, cybersecurity, medical devices, and diamonds to the UK. Israel-UK trade has grown strongly through the bilateral agreement replacing the EU-Israel trade pact post-Brexit.
disputes: UK arms sales suspension review post-Gaza

diplomatic.summary: The UK and Israel have historically close relations through security, intelligence, and historical ties (Balfour Declaration). The Gaza conflict has strained relations significantly. The UK suspended some arms export licences to Israel in 2024, and UK public opinion has become more critical. Both sides maintain close contact at official level but political relationships are under pressure.
recent_incidents: UK suspension of some arms licences to Israel (2024)
UK abstentions/votes at UN calling for Gaza ceasefire
Netanyahu ICC arrest warrant (UK bound by ICC obligations)

military.summary: Historically close intelligence and defence cooperation. The UK and Israel share signals intelligence and counterterrorism cooperation. UK arms sales to Israel were partially suspended in 2024 due to Gaza conflict concerns. Joint defence technology development continues in areas like cybersecurity and drone technology.
incidents: UK intelligence cooperation with Israel on Iran nuclear file

financial.summary: London is a major listing venue for Israeli tech companies. UK venture capital is active in Israeli tech startups. Israeli investors have significant UK real estate and financial holdings. Post-Gaza, some investors have become cautious but commercial ties remain robust.

energy.summary: Limited direct energy trade. UK interest in Eastern Mediterranean gas including potential Israeli exports. Some cooperation in clean energy technology.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific cooperation in life sciences, AI, cybersecurity, and materials. Israel-UK research and innovation bilateral programme active. Jewish community links facilitate researcher exchanges. UK universities have numerous Israeli academic staff and students.
